prompt: Please create a new jetbrains plugin for visualizing size of the project. One should be able to split by language, module, or dir tree and dir/file type (so test, source code, generated source etc). I
Plugin 'Project Stats' (version '0.1.0') is not compatible with the current version of the IDE, because it requires build 252.* or older but the current build is IU-261.22158.277
